author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Chairmens Event 1986
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR
Questions and Answers
With the Chairmen of FWBO Centres
At Their Annual General Meeting in 1986
Contents



1 Senior and responsible Order members - do they n eglect their own personal
development because of their practical responsibili ties
3 The Order Office and Bhante's relationship with the individuals in it
4 Organisation in the F/WBO The Chairmen's meeting and its purpose
7 Chapter convenors and Mitra Convenors Decision making by consensus in the Order
A constitution for the Order
8 The image of the FWBO among other Buddhists and the world at large.
Criticism of other groups.
Comments on Subhuti's 'An Old Net for New Monsters'
False views and the Brahmajala Sutta
11 Dealing with the press Departing from contemporary orthodoxy, i.e. pseudo- liberal views
14 Premature kalyana mitrata?
15 Encouraging the taking of responsibility and in itiative in the Order - initially
simply by paying Order fees and attending Order wee kends
'Bodhisattva spirit' and working in co-operatives
Order Chapter meetings as spiritual workshops
The general decline in Great Britain
18 Taking responsibility Commitment and lifestyle on the road to ordination
20 How co-ops can harm centres Is the Order shrinking?
22 The benefits of attending Order meditation cour ses at Vajraloka
23 'Reprocessing' older Order members!
24 Improving ritual and pujas
25 Not to settle down once ordained!
26 Encouragement to Order members to attend chapte r meetings, Order
weekends, and report in to Shabda
The future of Shabda as the Order expands
28 Next Session - training Dharma teachers A Dharma College
30 Gelugpa/scholastic monasteries in Tibet
32 Guhyaloka as Bhante's 'Ashram'?
33 Doing things in a more 'non-organised' way outs ide Britain
34 Learning from other Buddhist and religious grou ps?
38 Taking up a visualisation meditation upon ordin ation
39 Stupa visualisation
40 Encouraging the development of Bodhisattva spir it
41 Geographical areas for the FWBO to spread to
43 Bhante's work in progress at the time of the se ssion (1986) and literary plans

for the future
44 FWBO and Bhante related anniversaries
46 Rock and roll, punk rock, and violence
47 Being careful about types of music listened to or films watched
48 The connection between sex and violence
49 Bhante's queries on the ordination conference r ecommendations
53 Suggestions for the 1987 Order Convention
